name: visionflow-diagram-render
description: Diagram-as-code render gate (RES-b). Renders presentation/report/diagrams/*.mmd to light-theme SVG in a real headless Chrome via raw Chrome DevTools Protocol over node's built-in WebSocket (no npm runtime dependency), using a locally vendored mermaid bundle with no CDN dependency. LIGHT default theme; bakes the browser-computed text fill and a white background into every SVG.
